summary: Completed comprehensive testing of trivia generator MC naming convention and PPTX formatting fixes. Backend API and frontend integration working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/mc-next-name returns MC_19_D with 72 existing files
MC form auto-populates round name as MC_19_D in read-only field
REG form category dropdown works with SharePoint integration
MISC/MYS/BIG forms use text input for names
Generated REG PPTX slide 12 review title shows category name without _N suffix (1980s not 1980s_4)
Generated REG PPTX slide 13 has GIF image filling the slide (100% coverage)
Generated MC PPTX slide 12 review title shows 'Multiple Choice'
Generated MC PPTX slide 14 answers have no 'Answers' title
All CRUD operations work (create, read, update, delete rounds)
Cover image upload and serving functionality
PowerPoint generation for all round types
